regime.filter: enter only when SPY >= its 200-day average

note: Modeled Black-Scholes fills (IV = 60d realized x 1.12); SPY/SPX options are the most liquid listed, so fills are realistic. ~80-90% accurate, NOT 99% — the ROR comes with real bear-market losers. Per-trade ROR becomes portfolio CAGR only via position sizing, which sets the drawdown.
